{{Quote|The tall, lanky Gandeidan cooha is well adapted to the low gravity of Gandeid IV, where it feeds primarily on flightless noli nestlings. Adult noli have powerful beaks and claws, and the cooha's slashing teeth provide self-defense during nest raiding forays.|Wilek Nereus' personal notes|<ref name="TABSB" />}}
'''Coohas''' were flightless, predatory [[Bird/Legends|avians]] native to [[Gandeid IV]],<ref name="TABSB" /> a temperate,<ref name="CSWE" /> low-[[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Gandeid system/Legends|Gandeid system]].<ref name="TABSB" /> They were up to a [[Meter/Legends|meter]] and a half tall and covered in [[feather]]s. They had a large head in comparison to their lanky body, with a thin neck connecting them; their beaks were filled with small, slashing [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]]. Coohas had two thin wings that ended in a long, sharp [[Claw/Legends|talon]], and two long, thin [[Limb/Legends|legs]] that each ended in a two-toed, taloned foot.<ref name="TABSB" />

The cooha primarily fed on the flightless nestlings of [[noli]], a species that, as adults, had powerful beaks and claws. The Cooha's slashing teeth were used to defend it from adults when it raided noli nests. [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|governor]] [[Wilek Nereus]] of [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]], a collector of the dentition of predatory creatures, included the cooha's slashing teeth in his collection.<ref name="TABSB" />
